text.title: Agency Discovery Call Playbook Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: prep
step.action: Pull lead context; pre-fill script template.

step.name: run-call
step.action: Walk through 4 phases: rapport / problem / budget / fit.

step.name: writeup
step.action: Convert to structured writeup with quotes.
step.decision-gate: Reject if budget missing or quotes empty.

step.name: route-to-next-step
step.action: Apply next_step enum; hand off to proposal author or nurture queue.
